raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a dispute on XX/XX/XXXX for {$5400.00} and as of XXXX XX/XX/year>2024 it has not been resolved. I provided several information that provided clearer proof that I was scammed or a victim of a bait and switch and was giving no resolve. 

The people in the dispute center did not understand what a webinar was and kept asking me the same questions, even with proof, Citi has a reputation of not resolving disputes. They did not help nor protect as they say they would.
